name: Example: Selector TIME_NS (time stamp of message in units of 10 microseconds)
title: Example: Selector TIME_NS (time stamp of message in units of 10 microseconds)

description: Typ int64 (signed 64 bit integer) – only readable.
example.code:
On message CAN1.100 {
  Write("CAN – Frame with time %I64d received", this.time_ns);
